offer: For small law practices processing 5–15 cases/month, inefficient document management causes lost or misplaced files. We provide an organized archiving system instead of manual filing systems or generic document storage solutions.
problem: inefficient document management leading to lost or misplaced files
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for small law practices
Indie Hackers posts on document management solutions
DM outreach to small law practices with demo video
Community forums for sharing legal practice tools
try_it: Let users try searchable document archive with 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of the archiving system
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Post weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Set default reminders for document reviews
CSV import feature for existing files
Streamline onboarding process for new users
